info.title: Sockseek daemon API
info.description: HTTP API for the Sockseek daemon.

get.summary: Gets server identity and protocol information.
Gets current daemon and Soulseek client status.
Lists SignalR event types and their snapshot invalidation behavior.

get.description: Default results contain only execution roots where ParentJobId is null. Set includeAll=true for a flat list of every matching job.

get.summary: Gets a job snapshot by id.
Gets a job snapshot by workflow and display id.
Gets raw search responses for a search job.
get.description: Use afterSequence to incrementally fetch raw responses after the last seen sequence.

get.summary: Gets file candidates for a search-like job.

post.summary: Projects search results as file candidates.

get.summary: Gets folder candidates for an album search-like job.
get.description: Set includeFiles=true only when the client needs selectable files. Folder file counts can come from search results and may not represent a full browse of the remote folder.

post.summary: Projects search results as album folders.
Projects search results as aggregate track candidates.
Projects search results as aggregate album candidates.
Starts a folder retrieval job for a selected album result folder.
post.description: Retrieves the full remote folder contents for a selected folder result. Search responses can omit child items that did not match the original query.

post.summary: Starts one or more file download jobs from selected search result files.
post.description: The source search job identifies where the candidate refs came from. Per-download settings belong in the request options, not in the original search job.

post.summary: Starts an album/folder download job from a selected folder result.
post.description: The source search job identifies where the folder ref came from. Per-download settings belong in the request options, not in the original search job.

post.summary: Completes a manual-selection job without starting additional downloads.
post.description: Use this when a DownloadBehavior.Manual job reached AwaitingSelection and the caller wants to close the manual step without resuming the job.

post.summary: Cancels a job when cancellation is available.
Cancels a workflow job by display id.
post.description: Convenience endpoint for CLI-style cancellation prompts. Normal GUI clients should prefer AvailableActions on known job ids.

post.summary: Tries the next candidate for an active job download.
Tries the next candidate for an active job download by display id.
Submits an input extraction job.
Submits a generic Soulseek search job.
post.description: Search jobs are discovery-oriented. They store raw Soulseek results; use projection endpoints to view those results as files, album folders, or aggregate candidates, then use follow-up download endpoints for selected refs.

post.summary: Submits a track search job.
post.description: Track search jobs are suitable for exploratory pick-then-download UIs: inspect projected file candidates from the result endpoints, then start follow-up downloads from selected refs.

post.summary: Submits an album search job.
post.description: Album search jobs are suitable for exploratory pick-then-download UIs: inspect projected folder candidates from the result endpoints, then start a follow-up folder download from the selected ref.

post.summary: Submits a single-file download job.
post.description: Use DownloadBehavior.Automatic for normal transfer jobs. Use DownloadBehavior.Manual when the job should pause at AwaitingSelection for caller approval/selection before resuming the same job.

post.summary: Submits an album/folder download job.
post.description: Use DownloadBehavior.Automatic for normal transfer jobs. Use DownloadBehavior.Manual when the job should pause at AwaitingSelection for caller approval/selection before resuming the same job.

post.summary: Submits an aggregate track search job.
post.description: Aggregate jobs can download automatically or, with DownloadBehavior.Manual, pause after candidate grouping so the caller can choose which child downloads to resume.

post.summary: Submits an aggregate album search job.
post.description: Aggregate album jobs can download automatically or, with DownloadBehavior.Manual, pause after bucket projection so the caller can choose which child downloads to resume.

post.summary: Submits a job list from draft child jobs.
post.description: Job drafts are submission payloads only. Submitted children appear as normal runtime jobs in subsequent job/workflow snapshots.

get.summary: Gets a workflow snapshot by id.
get.description: Default results contain only execution roots where ParentJobId is null. Set includeAll=true for a flat list of every workflow job. Use /tree for the same jobs grouped by ParentJobId.

get.summary: Gets the execution tree for a workflow.
get.description: This tree is built only from ParentJobId relationships. Follow-up jobs started from search results remain workflow roots and expose SourceJobId instead.

post.summary: Cancels cancellable jobs in a workflow.
